name: Matsu Japanese Restaurant
description: A Palisades Park staple with one of the longest AYCE menus in Bergen County. Known for generous sashimi portions and fast refills.

name: Sakura Sushi Palace
description: Best-value AYCE on Broad Ave. Small but efficient — great for a quick lunch with friends who want variety without spending much.

name: New Tokyo AYCE
description: Palisades Park's most comprehensive AYCE menu with a 120-minute limit. Hot pot add-on available. Drinks included with dinner.

name: Fuji AYCE Sushi
address: 56 W Central Blvd, Palisades Park, NJ 07650
description: A quieter, more intimate AYCE option in Palisades Park. Quality fish and attentive staff make up for the smaller menu size.

name: Seki Japanese Restaurant
description: Fort Lee's most consistent AYCE spot, just minutes from the GWB. Strong value at lunch and reliable fish quality year-round.

name: Hana Japanese Restaurant
description: No-frills AYCE on Lemoine with some of the lowest prices in Fort Lee. Perfect for a casual weekday lunch.

name: Sakura Garden AYCE
description: Flushing's favorite budget AYCE. Unbeatable lunch prices, a wide menu, and a lively atmosphere popular with the local community.

name: Sushi Palace Flushing
description: No frills, maximum variety. Rolls-focused AYCE at Flushing's most accessible price point — great for groups on a budget.

name: Imperial Sushi AYCE
description: Flushing's premium AYCE with a 120-minute limit and the widest menu in Queens. Reservations recommended on weekends.

name: Mono+Mono
description: Koreatown's finest AYCE experience. Bluefin tuna and wagyu rolls set it apart. Sake and cocktails included with dinner. Reserve in advance.

name: Yuki Sushi
description: A Hell's Kitchen go-to after shows and late nights. Later hours than most, solid fish quality, and no reservation needed.

name: Sakura Sushi JC
description: Jersey City's most complete AYCE menu near Grove St PATH. Popular with young professionals and families crossing from Manhattan.

name: Sushi X
description: Ridgewood's AYCE sushi on Chestnut St. BYOB. Lunch ~$26, dinner ~$29–$31 depending on day. A local Bergen County favorite.

name: Miga Sushi
description: Denville AYCE on E Main St. BYOB, 90-minute limit, charge for unfinished food. Flat rate ~$33/person. Closed Mondays.

name: Miga Sushi Wayne
description: Wayne location of Miga Sushi on Berdan Ave. Same AYCE format as Denville — flat rate ~$33, 90-minute limit, BYOB. Closed Mondays.

name: Sushi Village
address: 68 Newark Pompton Tpke, Little Falls, NJ 07424
description: Little Falls AYCE on Newark Pompton Tpke. BYOB with free parking. Flat rate ~$31/person. Great neighborhood spot in Passaic County.

name: Arigato
address: 581 High Mountain Rd, North Haledon, NJ 07508
description: North Haledon AYCE on High Mountain Rd. Small and cozy — reservations recommended. BYOB with some of the best prices in Passaic County (~$23/person).

name: Yuki Hana
description: Woodland Park AYCE on Browertown Rd. ~$30/person weekdays. Free parking. Full menu of sashimi, nigiri, and rolls. Closed Mondays.

name: Sushi Village South Hackensack
description: Sushi Village's Route 46 location. BYOB, free parking. ~$30–35/person flat AYCE rate. Closed Tuesdays.

name: Sakura Sushi
address: 79 N Middletown Rd, Pearl River, NY 10965
description: Pearl River's AYCE spot in Rockland County. Lunch AYCE $17, dinner $26. Both AYCE and a la carte available. Free parking.

name: A Sushi
description: New AYCE spot on Route 17 in Carlstadt that opened in 2025. Only 44 seats — call ahead to confirm current hours and pricing. BYOB.

name: Arigato Edgewater
description: Dinner-only AYCE on River Rd in Edgewater (opens 5pm). Note: AYCE does NOT include sashimi. BYOB. ~$28–32/person.

name: Kikoo Sushi
description: East Village AYCE with a huge menu: sushi, sashimi, tempura, udon, teriyaki, and dessert. 18% gratuity added auto. $50 option adds unlimited drinks.

name: Sushi Hayashi
description: Midtown East omakase-style AYCE: 14-course tasting + unlimited nigiri + unlimited sake/beer for $98. Only 10 seats — book on Resy. Closed Sundays. $6/piece fee for uneaten sushi.

name: Osaka Sushi
description: Tenafly AYCE on Washington St. BYOB. Weekday $29.95, weekend $31.95. Kids under 10 priced separately.

name: Asahi Sushi
description: Norwood AYCE on Livingston St. BYOB. Weekday $28.99, weekend/holiday $30.99. Unlimited sashimi, nigiri, rolls, and kitchen dishes 7 days a week.

name: Rakuzen AYCE Sushi
description: Borough Park favorite with flat-rate AYCE sushi and sashimi starting at $30.99. Open every day with fast table service and a broad roll menu.

name: Rakuzen AYCE Sushi Elmhurst
description: Spacious Elmhurst AYCE spot on Queens Blvd with a roomy dining room and quick refill pace. $30.99 flat rate with full sushi and kitchen menu.

name: Las Vegas Sushi
description: BYOB AYCE sushi in Fort Lee at $38 per person. A solid mid-tier option in the Fort Lee corridor with a full roll and kitchen menu.

name: Sushi Palace Edison
description: Part of the popular Sushi Palace NJ chain. All-you-can-eat sushi and sashimi freshly made to order. $28.95 weekdays, $30.95 weekends.

name: Sushi Palace Somerville
description: Downtown Somerville location of the Sushi Palace NJ chain. Fresh-to-order AYCE sushi and sashimi at $28.95 weekdays, $30.95 weekends.

name: Sushi Palace Summit
description: The Summit outpost of Sushi Palace NJ, located in downtown Summit. Popular with the local commuter crowd. $28.95 weekdays, $30.95 weekends.

name: Sushi Palace Princeton
description: Southernmost Sushi Palace NJ location in the Princeton/Kingston shopping mall. Great option for Central NJ with fresh-to-order AYCE at $28.95/$30.95.

name: East Hana JC
description: A Jersey City go-to for AYCE sushi near the waterfront district. Well-regarded for freshness and a welcoming atmosphere close to the PATH.

name: Sake Sushi
description: Brooklyn's most affordable AYCE spot at $13 lunch / $20 dinner. Tiny no-frills room in Gravesend with 2-hour seating. No-reservations only — expect a wait on weekends.

name: 66s Fusion
description: Elevated AYCE sushi fusion near the Brooklyn Navy Yard. Fresher and more creative than typical AYCE spots. Closed Sundays.

name: Sushi Village Westwood
description: Bergen County AYCE staple on Broadway in Westwood. Part of the Sushi Village NJ family. $27.99 weekdays, $28.99 weekends. Reliable value with a broad menu.

name: Ginza Sushi Lounge
address: 10 Akron St Ste 9, Staten Island, NY 10314
description: Staten Island's local AYCE favorite in Bulls Head. Closed Mondays. Fresh sushi and rolls made to order.

name: Fuji Sushi
description: Staten Island AYCE on Hylan Blvd. Closed Mon and Tue. ~$30/person dinner.

name: UMI Hotpot Sushi & Seafood
description: The Bronx's all-you-can-eat hotpot + sushi + seafood buffet. Lunch $22.99, dinner $34.99. Boba included.

name: Akino Sushi Elmhurst
description: Well-reviewed Elmhurst AYCE with 2-hour limit. Lunch $26 Mon-Fri. Dinner $41 weekdays / $43 weekends. Quality fish.

name: Akino Sushi Flushing
description: Modern Flushing AYCE from the Akino brand. Lunch ~$25, dinner ~$43. 2-hour seating. Newer location with fresh decor.

name: New Sushi Village Bayside
description: Long-running Bayside AYCE staple. Lunch $29.99-$31.99, dinner $31.99-$35. Consistent quality, good for groups.

name: River Japanese Cuisine
description: Neighborhood AYCE gem in Oakland Gardens/Bayside. Lunch ~$22, dinner ~$26. Good value for Queens.

name: Kikoo Sushi UWS
description: Kikoo Sushi's Upper West Side location. $45 AYCE, $50 with unlimited drinks. Less crowded than the East Village spot.

name: Nova Asian Bistro
address: 1215 Jericho Tpke, New Hyde Park, NY 11040
description: Long Island AYCE in New Hyde Park. Fusion menu of sushi, teriyaki, and more. ~$36/person dinner.

name: Sushi Time 560
description: BYOB AYCE on Long Island in Bethpage. Lunch ~$20, dinner ~$30. No alcohol served — bring your own.

name: Watawa Sushi & Lounge
description: Bethpage AYCE with weekday/weekend pricing. Lunch $23.95-$25.95, dinner $26.95-$29.95. Solid Long Island neighborhood spot.

name: Sake Asian
description: Massapequa AYCE with sushi and hibachi. Weekday cash $28.99 / card $30.99. Weekend cash $30.99 / card $32.99.

name: Sushi Castle
description: Well-reviewed Westchester AYCE just north of the Bronx. Weekday $29.95, weekend $31.95. Kids $15.95.

name: Sushi Palace Yonkers
description: Sushi Palace's Westchester outpost on Central Park Ave in Yonkers. AYCE sushi + hibachi + Chinese dishes. ~$30/person.

name: Sushi House Teaneck
description: One of the best value AYCE spots in Bergen County. Lunch $14.99, dinner $22.99. Kids half price under 10.

name: Picnic Sushi
description: BYOB AYCE on Main St Fort Lee. Dinner only, closed Sundays. Cash $25, card $28. Call ahead to confirm hours.

name: Miga Sushi Livingston
description: Third Miga Sushi location in Livingston. BYOB, 90-min limit, closed Mondays. Same great quality as Denville and Wayne.

name: Supra Revolving Sushi
description: NJ's conveyor-belt AYCE sushi experience. BYOB, no corkage fee. Lunch $21.99, dinner $32.99. Unique and fun for groups.

name: Sakana New Brunswick
description: Modern BYOB AYCE near Rutgers with iPad ordering and robot delivery. ~$32/person weekends. The most tech-forward AYCE in NJ.

name: East Hana Metuchen
description: East Hana BYOB AYCE in Metuchen. Weekday ~$25, weekend ~$32. Fresh fish and a welcoming atmosphere.

name: Sakana East Hanover
description: Sakana BYOB AYCE on Route 10 in East Hanover. Modern concept, ~$32-35/person. iPad ordering. Good for Morris County.

name: Ajisai AYCE
description: Tampa's go-to AYCE near USF. ~$30/person flat rate, late-night hours, student discount with USF ID.

name: Sushi Yama
description: Popular Brandon-area AYCE with sushi and hibachi. Lunch $21.95 (Mon-Sat 11am-3:30pm), dinner $31.95.

name: Kingdom Sushi
address: 4027 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33611
description: South Tampa's premium Brazilian-Japanese AYCE. Lunch $32.90, dinner $40.90. Desserts included.

name: Saki Endless Sushi Carrollwood
address: 11921 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
description: Best-value endless sushi + hibachi in North Tampa. Lunch $16.99, dinner $21.99 including soup and salad.

name: Shogun Sushi
address: 1713 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33629
description: Creative AYCE sushi in South Tampa near Hyde Park. Menu includes Pepper Tuna, Sushi Tacos, Takoyaki. Lunch ~$22, dinner ~$33.

name: Koizi Endless Hibachi & Sushi
description: Best-value AYCE in New Tampa. Lunch $13.95, dinner $19.95, Sundays $14.95 all day. Closed Tuesdays.

name: Umami Endless Sushi & Hibachi
address: 3942 Tyrone Blvd N Ste D, Saint Petersburg, FL 33709
description: St. Pete's go-to endless sushi + hibachi near Tyrone Square Mall. Lunch $19.95, dinner $28.95 (starts 3pm daily).

name: Saki Endless Sushi Clearwater
address: 2643 Gulf to Bay Blvd Ste 1560, Clearwater, FL 33759
description: Saki's Clearwater location near Clearwater Mall. Endless sushi + hibachi. Lunch ~$17, dinner ~$23.

name: Saki Endless Sushi Palm Harbor
address: 35927 US Hwy 19 N Ste 1523, Palm Harbor, FL 34684
description: Northernmost Saki Endless location in Pinellas County. Lunch ~$17, dinner ~$22. Endless sushi + hibachi format.

name: Ginza Endless Sushi & Hibachi
address: 6417 E County Line Rd Ste 104, Tampa, FL 33647
description: Best lunch deal in Tampa Bay at $12.95. 200+ item AYCE menu with endless sushi and hibachi. Closed Tuesdays.
